nodes.description: Do you know who I am? I am Boba Fett.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Boba Fett™ Fine Art Print by artist Jesse Hernandez, also known as Urban Aztec. This Sideshow Convention Exclusive collectible artwork has been created in honor of Star Wars™ Celebration for fans hunting rare bounties.  Inspired by Urban Aztec's own Boba Fett Designer Collectible Bust from Unruly Industries™, the Boba Fett Fine Art Print blends two warrior cultures — the Maya and the Mandalorian™ — into one fearsome fighter. Geometric lines and intricate designs update his signature green, red, and yellow armor into a stoic silhouette that still sends shivers through the galaxy.  This Star Wars art print is available as an unframed, full bleed giclée as well as in a custom poster style framed format. Each Boba Fett Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 500 pieces. Don't miss your chance to bring home this incredibly unique Star Wars wall art for your collection, only available through Sideshow.  Ready to collect on that bounty? Bring home the Boba Fett Fine Art Print by Jesse Hernandez today.
nodes.name: Boba Fett™

nodes.description: Cooler than carbonite™, brighter than the twin suns of Tatooine™! Urban Aztec has set his rangefinder on a galaxy far, far away with the Boba Fett™ Silver Variant Bust — a stylish Star Wars™ Convention Exclusive collectible by artist Jesse Hernandez that blends Maya and Mandalorian™ influences into one badass bounty hunter.  Artist Statement: The first toys I collected as a kid were Star Wars figures. It's such an honor to come full circle and create my first official Star Wars piece. Honoring the culture in my own style, on the most feared Bounty hunter in the galaxy #Urbanaztec x #Bobafett  About the Artist:Jesse Hernandez (@UrbanAztec) is a visual artist born and raised in the San Francisco Bay area, most widely recognized for his street art murals, vinyl toys, and diverse Illustration work. His style is known as Urban Aztec, a combination of graffiti and ancient indigenous culture. Hernandez's artwork has been featured by Warner Bros., the San Jose Sharks, the Oakland Museum, Rockstar energy drink, Rolling Stone magazine, Fandango, Juxtapoz, Gears of War 4, X-Box, Playstation, Run the Jewels, Oakland Athletics, and the Cosmopolitan Las Vegas. Hernandez has shown art in galleries and museums around the world. He has also painted murals in Oakland, San Francisco, Los Angeles, Mexico City and Amsterdam.
nodes.name: Boba Fett (Silver Variant)

nodes.description: Sideshow and New Zealand Mint are stoked to launch a new Star Wars™ silver coin series, inspired by the Lucasfilm series, The Bad Batch™. This first release features the commander of the team, Hunter™ - a strong and loyal soldier who has extraordinary senses, allowing him to spot targets with ease. Of course, more commandos will come, so keep a look out!   Officially licensed, the reverse of the coin showcases the selective colorisation of the incredible fighter in his armor, holding his weapon of choice — the Vibroblade™. The coin also features detailed engravings to enhance the design. As a legal tender coin, the obverse bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II.   The limited-edition coin arrives inside a wonderful Star Wars™ branded case, which includes images of the entire squad. A Certificate of Authenticity can be found at the back of the box, along with the coin's unique number.   The mintage is set at just 3,000 pure silver coins, so storm in quick before you miss out!
nodes.name: Hunter 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: Elite Imperial soldiers, Death Troopers are encased in specialized stormtrooper armor with a dark, ominous gleam. These troops serve as bodyguards and enforcers for figureheads including Director KrennicTM, a highly placed officer within the Advanced Weapons Research division of the Empire, and later Moff GideonTM and others.  Sideshow and Hot Toys are excited to bring a stylish displayable special variant of the Death Trooper Sixth Scale Collectible Figure with black chrome colored armor design as an exclusive item only available in select markets!   This Death Trooper collectible figure stands at 32.5cm tall and specially features skillfully created black chrome armor and helmet with LED light-up function, a fabric bodysuit, a blaster rifle and pistol, and a hexagonal figure base!   Enhance your display with this lustrous armored trooper!
nodes.name: Death Trooper (Black Chrome)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Hot Toys are excited to be expanding its Star Wars collectibles line up today by introducing a greatly detailed sixth scale collectible set featuring Clone Commander Appo and a 501st Battalion BARC Speeder inspired by the popular Star Wars: The Clone Wars animated series!  A clone trooper in Republic service, Appo took part in a number of critical battles during the fight against the Separatists. In the final days of the war, Appo accompanied Anakin Skywalker to Coruscant's Jedi Temple as part of Order 66 to eliminate all the Jedi…  The BARC speeder gave clone troopers increased operational range, great speed, mobility, and firepower otherwise unavailable to the foot soldier. A more aggressive and bulkier design than slimmer speeder bikes used by the Jedi, the BARC speeder was used in scouting and escort missions on a variety of worlds.  The highly-detailed Clone Trooper collectible figure is specially crafted based on the appearance of Commander Appo. It features beautifully crafted Clone Trooper armor and helmet, a skillfully tailored outfit, a blaster rifle, and a display base!  As for the new sixth scale BARC Speeder, it measures 68cm in length and features a detailed mechanical structure, beautifully paint application with weathering effects, articulated handlebars, and a rocky themed base.    Enhance your Star Wars display with this fantastic Appo and BARC Speeder collectible set!
nodes.name: Commander Appo with BARC Speeder

nodes.description: An army is only as effective as its mobility, so the Grand Army of the Republic was outfitted with an increasingly varied and versatile vehicle pool as the Clone Wars progressed. The BARC speeder gave clone troopers increased operational range, great speed, mobility, and firepower otherwise unavailable to the foot soldier. A more aggressive and bulkier design than slimmer speeder bikes used by the Jedi, the BARC speeder was used in scouting and escort missions on a variety of worlds. They were easily adaptable, with support struts that could be added to hold a stretcher or sidecar.  The world of Star Wars collectibles is continuing to grow as Sideshow Hot Toys is thrilled to introduce an astonishing Heavy Weapons Clone Trooper and BARC Speeder with Sidecar Sixth Scale Collectible Set inspired by the popular Star Wars: The Clone Wars animated series!  The highly-detailed Clone Trooper collectible figure is specially crafted based on the appearance of Heavy Weapons Clone Trooper. It features skillfully developed Clone Trooper armor and helmet, a blaster rifle, a satchel bag, and a display base!  The brand new sixth scale BARC Speeder measures at 68cm in length and comes with an attachable sidecar armed with an articulated blaster. The vehicle has a detailed mechanical structure, astonishing paint application with weathering effects, articulated handlebars, and a rocky themed base for a variety of poses.    This collectible set will definitely be an extraordinary addition to any Star Wars collection.
nodes.name: Heavy Weapons Clone Trooper and BARC Speeder with Sidecar

nodes.description: … just as we neared the throng of Martians, I caught a glimpse of the prisoner … the beauty of her perfect and symmetrical figure.   Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Dejah Thoris 1:3 Scale Statue, a sci-fi statue collectible for fans of the Martian novels by Edgar Rice Burroughs.  The beautiful princess of Mars has been taken prisoner in this showstopping statue design, a perfect centerpiece for any sci-fi fan's collection. The Dejah Thoris 1:3 Scale Statue measures 35.5 tall and 15 wide as she stands chained to a large white tusk in the hostile landscape of Mars. Additional bones and skulls are embedded in the rock at her feet, including the uniquely shaped remains of a green Martian. She awaits rescue from the Earthman John Carter, a hero who pledges to protect the princess and her kingdom of Helium.  The Dejah Thoris Statue is fully sculpted apart from the silver link shackles on her wrists and the decorative gold chains on her chest. Dejah Thoris' portrait features a cascade of black hair and metallic makeup accents complementing her customary Martian ensemble. From head to toe, the Martian woman's beautiful bronze physique has been carefully considered, and she is adorned with gold accents including her strapped sandals, thong bikini, arm cuffs, and ornate crown. This highly detailed Dejah Thoris collectible brings the world of Barsoom closer to home.  Brave the wastes of Mars and add the Dejah Thoris 1:3 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio to your collection today!
nodes.name: Dejah Thoris

nodes.description: Sideshow and Beast Kingdom present the Darth Vader EAA-163 Action Figure!  By coating the Darth Vader action figure with different coloring techniques, Darth Vader is presented in different levels of luster. With the classic light-emitted device on the chest and the familiar breathing sound, Beast Kingdom shocks fans again with Darth Vader's strong energy field.  To faithfully re-present the setting in the film, Beast Kingdom makes Darth Vader's cape and vest with real fabrics and metal wire at the lap for fans to make different heroic pose for Darth Vader. There are three pairs of extra palms and the indispensable lightsaber in the Star Wars collectible series.

nodes.description: I am C-3PO, human-cyborg relations.   Sideshow presents the C-3PO™ Life-Size Figure, a steadfast 1:1 scale figure joining your galaxy of Star Wars™ collectibles.  Goodness gracious me! If your collection needs a protocol droid, look no further than the C-3PO Life-Size Figure. Captured in faithful, realistic detail, this collectible stands 6'2 tall and 28 wide, situated on a Millennium Falcon™ base with ship flooring and circuitry details. C-3PO's signature shining gold exterior is detailed with weathering, a silver right leg, and multicolored wiring in the abdomen. His arms are articulated at the shoulder joints and can be rotated to various degrees to change up his posture, from etiquette-ready to a startled pose. The magnetic restraining bolt can even be removed from his torso as an added detail.  Fluent in over six million forms of communication, the C-3PO Life-Size Figure comes programmed with a randomized voice track feature. He can recite a number of iconic lines from throughout his adventures through the Skywalker™ saga using the included remote control. His eyes also include a light-up function that can be activated via a button on the back of his head. Bring some life to your droid companion with these interactive features, powered by the included external cord.  Pair C-3PO with his constant companion the R2-D2™ Life-Size Figure by Sideshow, sold separately, to unite the most dynamic droid duo in the galaxy right in your own home.  If we may suggest a new strategy — let the droid in! Assist the Rebellion and bring home the C-3PO Life-Size Figure for your Star Wars collection today.
nodes.name: C-3PO

nodes.description: Flame Toys is thrilled to present the 27th entry into the Furai Model series, the A.W.E. Striker Model Kit!  The awesomely big size of this kit, measuring 280mm in length & 200mm in height (approximately 11in x 8in) perfectly compliments G.I. Joe figures in the Furai Model line (sold separately), allowing devoted fans of the series to complete their collection. All wheels are turnable and the front wheels' angles can be adjusted. Even the top cannon angle is adjustable, and the highly detailed engine and driving panel are sure to please the G.I. Joe enthusiasts out there!  Made of hard, plastic ABS material, this model kit is great for professional model makers who wish to create their own color scheme for the A.W.E. Striker, while different injection colors of runner parts and a simple assembly design make the model kit suitable for model kit beginners!  Calling all G.I. Joe fans! Add A.W.E. Striker to your collection today!

nodes.description: At the time of their introduction, the Republic clone troopers represented the future of galactic warfare. Far superior to battle droids, the clone troopers formed the backbone of the Republic's new military that waged war against the forces of the Confederacy of Independent Systems. So symbolic were they of the times, the galaxy-wide conflict that saw their debut took its name from their ranks: the Clone Wars.  Sideshow and Hot Toys are pleased to introduce a displayable special variant of the Clone Trooper Sixth Scale Collectible Figure in silver chrome color as an exclusive item only available in select markets.  This Clone Trooper collectible figure features a meticulously crafted silver-colored chrome armor and helmet, an interchangeable phase 2 helmet, a fabric bodysuit, a jetpack, two styles of blasters, and a figure base!   This sleek and gleaming trooper will be a highlight in your Star Wars collection!

nodes.description: Threezero and Marvel Studios are excited to present the DLX Iron Man Mark 3 Collectible Figure as the next entry in the Marvel DLX series. It adopts the classic colors of red and gold with a multi-layer metallic coating process, accurately replicating the design of Tony Stark's armored suit as seen in the Iron Man movies.  This fully-articulated collectible figure stands approximately at 6.9 (17.5cm) tall and is constructed of Threezero's renown DLX die-cast system with 48 points of articulation. Detailed structural engineering and exquisite design enable the figure to depict a variety of action poses while maintaining a realistic appearance.  LED lighting functions are located on the chest and the eyes, and the four flight panels on the back can flip to open and closed. Additional equipment and accessories include five pairs of interchangeable hands, two detachable arm missiles that can be connected onto both forearms, effect parts for shooting and flight poses, and a DLX action stand; allowing for a wide variety of display possibilities!  Add to your Marvel Collection today!
nodes.name: DLX Iron Man Mark 3

This Himiko Toga figure is a perfect addition to any My Hero Academia figure collection!

nodes.description: Even on the grandest stage of them all, when Andre the Giant walked in, everyone stopped to take notice of the Eighth Wonder of the World!   Sideshow and Super7 are proud to introduce a new ULTIMATES! figure of Andre the Giant in his iconic black singlet from his late 1980s run. Standing 8 tall, this ULTIMATES! figure includes interchangeable heads and hands as well as a beer can accessory.   Just like the man himself, this Andre the Giant ULTIMATES! figure is a wonder to behold, so don't wrestle with your decision for too long! Add this made-to-order figure to your collection before you get counted out!

Her striking eyes emanate the complex feelings for one's beloved such as loneliness, happiness, and joy from being loved.  Feel the glowing radiance of this beautiful maiden by adding her to your collection!

Despite being the third oldest brother out of four, he's always depicted as the tallest.  Add the Donatello Be@rbrick to your collection today, and remember- never pay full price for late pizza!

nodes.description: I do hope you understand what's about to happen - this is me being reasonable. – The Scarlet Witch  Wanda Maximoff, aka The Scarlet Witch, reveals to Doctor Strange how her children exist in every other Universe and her intention to possess the multiverse-traveling power so she can be in a reality where she can finally attain her longing desire. She then uses the Darkhold to dreamwalk and hijacks the consciousness of an alternate version of herself in another universe.  Continuing on the Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness collection, Sideshow and Hot Toys is excited to present the The Scarlet Witch (Deluxe Version) Sixth Scale Figure featuring amazing accessories for the Dreamwalking spell.   Beautifully crafted based on the appearance of Elizabeth Olsen as The Scarlet Witch in the movie, the figure features a newly developed head sculpt and tiara with stunning likeness, two styles of front hair sculptures, specially applied luminous reflective effect on eyes to emulate Scarlet Witch using her abilities, faithful recreation of costume in scarlet red applied with dramatic weathering effects, highly-detailed accessories such as the Darkhold, different styles of power-using effects accessories, and interchangeable hands with black finger tips.  In addition, the deluxe version will exclusively include a Dreamwalking spell effect accessory, candle diorama accessories, and a round-shaped display stand with magic spell graphic card to recreate the scene when The Scarlet Witch casts the forbidden spell.  The Scarlet Witch figure is now trespassing into your Marvel collection!
nodes.name: The Scarlet Witch (Deluxe Version)

nodes.description: You break the rules and you become a hero. I do it and I become the enemy. – The Scarlet Witch  After the loss of Vision and a life-changing experience with her two imaginary children in WandaVision, Wanda Maximoff's grief has triggered her to become the biggest threat in Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness. She's obsessed with using the potential of the multiverse to find an alternate reality where her twin sons are real and alive, and she's willing to kill anyone who gets in the way of that goal.  Inspired by the recently released Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness, Sideshow and Hot Toys is excited to introduce The Scarlet Witch Sixth Scale Collectible Figure from the bending universe.   Beautifully crafted based on the appearance of Elizabeth Olsen as The Scarlet Witch in the movie, the figure features a newly developed head sculpt and tiara with stunning likeness, two styles of front hair sculptures, specially applied luminous reflective effect on eyes to emulate Scarlet Witch using her abilities, faithful recreation of costume in scarlet red applied with dramatic weathering effects, highly-detailed accessories such as the Darkhold, different styles of power-using effects accessories, interchangeable hands with black finger tips and a figure stand.  Expand your Marvel collection today with the stunning Scarlet Witch figure.
nodes.name: The Scarlet Witch

Pitting Doctor Strange against the Gargantos alien, the two are seen in the middle of an extremely exciting-looking fight. With precision manufacturing and highly detailed paint-work, the D-Stage 129 takes collectors right into the middle of the action. For fans of another sure to be classic MCU movie, this is one Marvel collectible that is not to be missed.

nodes.description: Sideshow and Gantaku Anime are excited to present the Heavenly King Cat Statue from Eight Immortals and Nine Cats!  The background story comes from the Four Heavenly Kings in Chinese mythology and legend. Create the Four Heavenly kings with the image of a cat, Duo Wen. 'Duowen' means that he is quite proficient in Buddhism and hears about blessings and virtues in all directions. It can also be understood as being knowledgeable and loving to learn. Both worldly Dharma and Buddhism should have the spirit of the thirst for knowledge.  This statue stands 11.81' tall and comes with a door frame that stands 12.59' tall. Don't miss your chance to add this statue to your collection!

nodes.description: The Kitsune have a very rich and complicated role in Japanese culture. Often depicted as cunning shapeshifters who grow with wisdom and power as they age, the Kitsune have a magical aura that persists to this day.  Fascinated by masks, Jor Ros implements them into his art whenever possible. Drawing inspiration from Japanese fox masks, Jor Ros adds his own spin to it with Kitsune Mask. Now back in a second colorway, featuring the iconic dark navy blue that features prominently throughout his works. Contrasted beautifully with orange accents and his signature 'nope'.  Honor the legendary creature with Kitsune Mask (Kurayami Edition) and give your collection a mystical flair with this eye-grabbing piece!
nodes.name: Kitsune Mask (Kurayami Edition)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Joytoy are proud to present the Steel Bone 08 Fighting Mecha (Silver Guardian) Mecha Collectible Figure from the Dark Source line of collectibles.  Dark Source is an original line of scaled mecha, presenting a wide array of futuristic military vehicles, as well as the people who pilot and service them, from an imaginatively realized science-fiction world where different factions compete for control over a mysterious but powerful dark source energy.  The pilot and mecha both are manufactured with exacting and excruciating detail, perfect for creating your own original scenes or even those based on other popular mech franchises such as BATTLETECH, MechWarrior or Titanfall. Add to your collection today!
nodes.name: Steel Bone 09 Fighting Mecha (Silver Guardian)

nodes.description: Admiral Ackbar™ has arrived!  Ackbar was an intelligent and courageous military commander who served for the Rebel Alliance™ and New Republic™. Regarded as a brilliant tactician, he has gained a prominent fan following over the years.   This fourteenth release in the Star Wars™ Chibi Coin collection is made from 1oz pure silver, which has been shaped and colored to represent Admiral Ackbar™ as Chibi art. It showcases his distinct fish-like features as he strikes an authoritative pose. To confirm it is legal tender, the obverse bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II.   Officially licensed, the coin is placed inside a specially designed case, molded to the coin's shape, for protection. The case itself is stored inside a Star Wars-themed box, which features vivid images of Ackbar and includes a large window for display. A Certificate of Authenticity is printed on the back of the box, along with coin's unique number in the limited mintage of only 2,000 coins.   Harness the strength and courage of this great leader. Order yours today!
nodes.name: Admiral Ackbar 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: Begin your Star Trek: The Next Generation Chibi® Coin collection with the brilliant captain of the U.S.S. Enterprise-D, Jean-Luc Picard. Naturally, more Starfleet officers will come, so keep an eye out!  Officially licensed, this coin is made from 1oz pure silver and has been colored and shaped to mirror Picard as Chibi art. It showcases Picard in his red Starfleet uniform and of course, his iconic bald head.   The outer box is Star Trek themed which serves as the perfect complement to the coin. The box also includes a large window, allowing you to display your collectible as is! Inside, the coin is placed in an acrylic case for safe storage.   To confirm its legal tender, the effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II is engraved on the obverse of the coin and for further confirmation, a Certificate of Authenticity is printed on the back of the box.   It is sure to be popular, so grab yours quick before they zoom away at warp speed!
nodes.name: Jean-Luc Picard 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: Sideshow and Queen Studios are proud to present the Venom Life-Size Bust.   Queen Studios' 1:1 scale Venom brings to life the Lethal Protector of New York in this awe-inspiring limited edition collectible.   Carefully crafted from polystone and resin, the Queen Studios team has taken cues from Venom's symbiotic form to capture the character's unique elements. Rather than have the base separate from the bust, Venom's symbiotic form merges both together, representing how Venom bonds and merges with his host. The symbiote's eyes are bone white, his skin is jet black, and his renowned white corrupted spider insignia is pasted on his chest. The symbiote's teeth are on show and tentacle-like plasma is shooting from his torso creating a collectible that is out of this world! nodes.description: I am Dracula; and I bid you welcome, Mr. Harker, to my house.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Dracula Fine Art Print, an original horror art print inspired by Bram Stoker's literary classic, as illustrated by artist Mike Mahle.  One of the Gothic greats, Dracula defined generations of vampiric tales to come. Mike Mahle's moody vector art portrait is draped in shadows, with blood red accents giving the outside skies an air of foreboding and hostility. Trapped inside the Transylvanian castle, viewers are treated to a rare audience with the vampire as he descends a stone staircase. Count Dracula clutches a single candle for guidance in the darkness, newly arisen with the full moon's light.  This full bleed giclée presentation would have even the sophisticated vampire count envious! Each Dracula Fine Art Print in the collaborative release with Sideshow features an authorized, automated artist signature in the lower region of the image. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this mesmerizing tribute is a must-have for fans of Dracula's legacy in literature and beyond.  When he calls you to the castle, you cannot resist! Add the Dracula Fine Art Print by Mike Mahle to your horror artwork collection today.
nodes.name: Dracula

nodes.description: I'm almost done putting the final touches to your new uniform. I've taken an opportunity to make some slight … improvements. Initially swayed to side with Iron Man in the super hero Civil War, Spider-Man gets a red and gold upgrade to his look. This tribute to an iconic super-suit features detailed rendering on the metallic costume elements and a warm yellow and orange background of mechanical gears. With vibrant repulsors, armored arachnid arms, and his heroic can-do attitude, Iron Spider is ready to face threats in the friendly neighborhood and beyond.  Originally created as a variant cover for Deadpool #14 (2019), written by Skottie Young for Marvel Comics, this comic book collectible is now available for fans in a high-end format. Each Iron Spider Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. Suit up with Spider-Man and add the Iron Spider Fine Art Print by Mark Brooks to your collection today!

nodes.description: …by the dim and yellow light of the moon, as it forced its way through the window shutters, I beheld the wretch — the miserable monster whom I had created.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Frankenstein Fine Art Print, an original horror art print inspired by Mary Shelley's literary classic, as imagined by artist Mike Mahle.  In a monstrous blend of scientific fact and horrific fiction, Frankenstein introduced the world to a tragic yet terrifying figure in its monster. Rejected both by his creator and crowds of fearful villagers, Frankenstein's monster is a being of gruesome contrast; he represents both miraculous achievement and dreadful mistakes. In this vector art portrait, the pitiable creation looks from inside the dark charnel house of his creation towards a cemetery. He is shackled to death, built from it, and will someday return to its indifferent embrace.  Each Frankenstein Fine Art Print in the collaborative release with Sideshow features an authorized, automated artist signature in the lower region of the full bleed giclée image. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this melancholy tribute to The Modern Prometheus belongs in human society — and namely, on your walls!  Give this creation a new life and bring home the Frankenstein Fine Art Print by Mike Mahle for your horror artwork collection today.
nodes.name: Frankenstein

nodes.description: Try smiling more, just like me! Smile, and all your troubles will go floating away!   Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Elena Season Pass 1:4 Scale Statue, a playful addition to your lineup of Street Fighter collectibles.  Measuring 24 high and 11.5 wide, this Street Fighter statue depicts a light-hearted and laughing Elena as she flips gleefully into her next fight. Balancing on one hand, the capoeira practitioner kicks her bare feet high toward the scorching sunlight. She expertly poses atop a single dock post while it sinks into a cerulean sea.  Inspired by the Street Fighter series' Brazilian Inland Jungle Stage, the Elena Season Pass Statue faithfully recreates this beloved character's in-game model as a charismatic, three-dimensional video game collectible. Here Elena wears her signature white bikini over her tall, muscular figure. Gold, blue, and red bangles encircle her arms and ankles to accessorize her hot-weather ensemble. With her sky blue nails and that shock of white hair, this girl certainly puts the show in showdown!  The Exclusive Edition of the Elena Season Pass 1:4 Scale Statue also includes a collectible Elena art print measuring 11x17 by artist Edwin Huang, making for a perfect display pairing.  Get ready for some fun in the sun when you bring home the Elena Season Pass 1:4 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio today!

nodes.description: The Truth is… He is Iron Man  Our newest Qrew member is none other than Marvel Universe's Tony Stark, clad in his classic Iron Man suit. Engineered to give Stark superhuman power and a variety of weapons at his disposal, this iconic exoskeleton has become a beloved character in its own right.  Featuring a ubiquitous power button symbolic of the arc reactor in front with two nonfunctional USB ports in the back next to a corded vinyl plug (which doubles as a stand), every detail makes this vinyl figure a true 360-degree experience.  Our humble homage to the not-so-humble Tony Stark comes in the form of a high-quality, hand-painted vinyl. This figure is being offered in a numbered limited edition of 2500 units and will come with a certificate of authenticity display plaque, an authentication stamp and premium packaging.  About Qrew:  Qrew Art Vinyl collections represent the unique artistic vision of QMx. Featuring original designs from our creative team, Qrew celebrates diverse cultures and styles while putting collecting back in collectibles. Always limited and forever intriguing, Qrew features high-quality, premium vinyl, embracing exciting new artistic themes from our team of global artists. This is QMx, unchained and unfettered. Welcome to Qrew

nodes.description: Harley Quinn, vibrant and manic as always, springs to life in this impressive 1:6th scale and 12 release. Sculpted by Hiroki Hayashi, Harley Quinn wields her famous baseball bat, themed leather Jacker zipper outfit, and mismatched shoes. This version of Ms. Quinn will fill any fans' need for a comic book accurate, yet realistic portrayal of this classic DC villain.  Koto Inc is proud to announce its new series, Kalā (क ला). Kalā, coming from the ancient Sanskrit word for art, has the same excruciating attention to detail as expert scribes would take when writing calligraphy. This series is not just a simple category of products, but a beautiful insight into the creative genius of our sculptors. Much like the great artists of the past have paved the way for realism and style in the art world, their dedicated artists have melded verism and the fun of animation into their sculptures.  Hiroki Hayashi (atelier iT), a master of bringing two-dimensional media to life, expresses himself through sculpted artistry. With a keen eye for anatomy and structure and a deep understanding of human expression, Hiroki Hayashi creates art for all to enjoy. His knowledge of expressive visage and the emotion of what makes sculpture come to life brings intrigue and connection to patrons of his work.
nodes.name: Harley Quinn Kala

Always seen with its Little Sister, the Rosie is one the of five Big Daddies from the BioShock series. They are built to protect Little Sisters while they are collecting ADAM. The strong bond between a Rosie and its Little Sister makes the Rosie highly aggressive. Attacking a Little Sister will definitely trigger the wrath of her Big Daddy protector. Each statue comes in deluxe full-color packaging, has a hand-numbered base and a certificate of authenticity.

nodes.description: When you need to chill out with your friends after saving the world, reach for a One-Scoops! This Mighty meltin' Power Rangers — Red, Yellow, and Blue Ranger Designer Collectible Bust Set by artist Erik Scoggan tastes like sweet, sweet victory.  Artist Bio: Erik Scoggan is a graphic artist from Southern California who was raised on superhero cartoons, junk food, and 'The Far Side' comics. Utilizing pop art and surrealist influences, the tone of his work gravitates towards the off-centered and humorous.  Artist Statement: In a continuation of the One-Scoops series, I wanted to bring a surrealist element to the iconic Power Rangers characters in ice cream form. When I was growing up, I always thought they had the coolest helmet designs, and it's fun to imagine what they would look like if they were melting out in the sun on a hot, Angel Grove, day. I'd like to think they'd sell these at that 'Gym and Juice Bar' those teenagers always seem to be hanging out in every episode.
nodes.name: Red, Yellow and Blue Power Rangers Scoops Set

nodes.description: Do you know who I am?   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Birds of Prey: Huntress Fine Art Print, a cinematic DC Comics art print by artist Tula Lotay.  She calls herself Huntress — f#!%ing fabulous, if you ask us! Inspired by actress Mary Elizabeth Winstead's live-action take on Helena Bertinelli in Birds of Prey (And the Fantabulous Emancipation of One Harley Quinn), this colorful portrait absolutely hits the mark — badass, brooding, and not a bow and arrow in sight. She stands with her weapon drawn, ready to fire at the next name on her hit list. Rage issues or sweet revenge? You decide.  Originally created as the cover for Birds of Prey: The Huntress, written by Greg Rucka for DC Comics, this dazzling Birds of Prey artwork is now available for fans in a fine art format. Each Birds of Prey: Huntress Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée or in a custom framed presentation, this movie Huntress artwork is one target you don't want to miss.  Gather up Gotham's most fantabulous girl gang in your collection when you pair Huntress with the Birds of Prey: Black Canary and Birds of Prey: Harley Quinn art prints by Tula Lotay, sold separately.  Just don't call her the Crossbow Killer! Set your sights on bringing home the Birds of Prey: Huntress Fine Art Print by Tula Lotay.
nodes.name: Birds of Prey: Huntress

nodes.description: Sideshow Art Prints presents the Simikiel: Sword of Absolution Fine Art Print, a fantasy art design by artist Peter Mohrbacher. Part of his original Angelarium series, this powerful portrait honors a sword-bearing Seraphim who represents retribution.  From the mind of Peter Mohrbacher, the Angelarium project has grown into an artistic anthology of designs inspired by numerous named angels throughout mythology. The Seraphim are heavenly manifestations of earthly beliefs, and Simikiel is the Angel of Vengeance who is said to deal punishment to the wicked. This otherworldly illustration invokes awe, showing Simikiel's unknowable visage, his double-edged sword, and his exposed heart as indication of his influence and power. Cool tones permeate the image, creating a sense of detachment and indifference as the Seraphim is called upon to dispense judgment.  This divine image of devastation is now being offered to fans in a high-end, museum quality print format for the first time in collaboration with Sideshow Art Prints. Each Simikiel: Sword of Absolution Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Angelarium series logo as a part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée and in a custom framed presentation, this angelic fantasy artwork makes a truly unique addition to any collection, especially alongside other Angelarium art prints.  Strike at your enemies and add the Simikiel: Sword of Absolution Fine Art Print by Peter Mohrbacher to your collection today!
nodes.name: Simikiel: Sword of Absolution

nodes.description: Sideshow presents the Leliel: By The Hidden Sun Fine Art Print, a stunning and surreal original fantasy artwork by Peter Mohrbacher.  From the mind of Peter Mohrbacher, the Angelarium project has grown into an artistic anthology of designs inspired by numerous named angels throughout mythology. The Leliel: By The Hidden Sun Fine Art Print shows Leliel, a Seraphim, cloaked in clear blue skies and swirling cosmos as she sits above the twisting vines of an infinite forest. A veil falls gracefully over her face and she stares pensively upon the world. At her waist, her black wings settle, resting even as waves of star-studded darkness flow around her floating form. This is the Angel of the Night, rising to meet the moon.  This breathtaking illustration is now being offered to fans in a high-end, museum quality print format for the first time in collaboration with Sideshow Art Prints. nodes.description: Sideshow presents the Tiferet: Emanation of Beauty Fine Art Print, an exquisite and otherworldly original fantasy artwork by Peter Mohrbacher. Part of his original Angelarium series, this contemplative composition honors the sixth Emanation of the Tree of Life, Tiferet.  From the mind of Peter Mohrbacher, the Angelarium project has grown into an artistic anthology of designs inspired by numerous named angels throughout mythology. The Tiferet: Emanation of Beauty Fine Art Print illustrates this angel drenched in warmth and existing in perfect harmony amid a storm of energy. His graceful form is poised in his rumination, rigid yet fluid, representative of the many aspects for which he is known. In his hands he holds a yellow orb to help guide the other Emanations. In this way, Tiferet exists as the equilibrium of the entire Tree of Life.  This resolute portrait is now being offered to fans in a high-end, museum quality print format for the first time in collaboration with Sideshow Art Prints. Each Tiferet: Emanation of Beauty Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Angelarium logo in the margin as part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée and in a custom framed presentation, this divine fantasy artwork makes a truly unique addition to any collection, especially alongside other Angelarium art prints.  Bring balance to your life with the Tiferet: Emanation of Beauty Fine Art Print by Peter Mohrbacher today.
nodes.name: Tiferet: Emanation of Beauty

nodes.description: Thanks, but I'm good with the singing gig.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Birds of Prey: Black Canary Fine Art Print, a cinematic DC Comics art print by artist Tula Lotay.  Told you she had a killer voice. Inspired by actress Jurnee Smollett's live-action performance as Dinah Lance in Birds of Prey (And the Fantabulous Emancipation of One Harley Quinn), this vibrant portrait of the crooning crimefighter pops against a backdrop of acoustic waves — talk about surround sound! Armed with her sonic voice and Harley Quinn's Good Night baseball bat, Black Canary is ready to shatter eardrums and kneecaps in the fight against her boss Roman Sionis, AKA Black Mask.   Originally created as the cover for Birds of Prey: Black Canary, written by Brenden Fletcher for DC Comics, this dazzling Birds of Prey artwork is now available for fans in a fine art format. Each Birds of Prey: Black Canary Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée or in a custom framed presentation, this movie-inspired Black Canary artwork will harmonize perfectly with your collection.  Gather up Gotham's most fantabulous girl gang in your collection when you pair Black Canary with the Birds of Prey: Huntress and Birds of Prey: Harley Quinn art prints by Tula Lotay, sold separately.  Your walls are just crying out for some new art! Make some noise and bring home the Birds of Prey: Black Canary Fine Art Print by Tula Lotay.
nodes.name: Birds of Prey: Black Canary

nodes.description: Sideshow Art Prints presents the Kundaliel: Angel of Ophiuchus Fine Art Print, a fantasy art design by artist Peter Mohrbacher. Part of his original Angelarium series, this striking portrait recognizes the secretive, serpentine Master of the Zodiac.  From the mind of Peter Mohrbacher, the Angelarium project has grown into an artistic anthology of designs inspired by numerous named angels throughout mythology. The Angels of the Zodiac embody the cardinal constellations that sit along the sun's celestial path. The mysterious Kundaliel embodies the symbolic serpent-bearer Ophiuchus in cosmic tradition. The Master's numerous snake tails ripple gracefully, seated on a throne above the climbing heights of a forest.  This enigmatic illustration is now being offered to fans in a high-end, museum quality print format for the first time in collaboration with Sideshow Art Prints. Each Kundaliel: Angel of Ophiuchus Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Angelarium series logo as a part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée and in a custom framed presentation, this angelic fantasy artwork makes a truly unique addition to any collection, especially alongside other Angelarium art prints.  Divine the secrets of the zodiac for yourself — bring home the Kundaliel: Angel of Ophiuchus Fine Art Print by Peter Mohrbacher today!
nodes.name: Kundaliel: Angel of Ophiuchus

nodes.description: Dreams are windows into the lives of our Multiversal selves. – Doctor Strange  Marvel Studios' Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness continues to unlock the Multiverse in MCU and revealed more threats lurking through every dimension. The Master of Mystic Arts must journey into the unknown with mystical allies both old and new and confront variants of some familiar faces along the way.  To expand on the Marvel collection, Sideshow and Hot Toys officially presents the Doctor Strange Sixth Scale Collectible Figure inspired by Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness.   Faithfully crafted based on the appearance of Benedict Cumberbatch as Doctor Strange in the movie, this figure features a newly developed head sculpt with short hair sculpture; an aesthetic recreation of the tunic outfit in layers, sculpted boots and arm wraps, a new Cloak of Levitation with blue patch; amazing accessories including The Book of Vishanti, a pair of handcuff, a number of mystic art effects, a dynamic figure base specially designed for the figure and the cape.  The Hot Toys team is excited to enrich the collector experience by adding a newly developed Doctor Strange head sculpt with a third eye on the forehead as seen in the post-credit scenes.  The new Doctor Strange figure is going to push your Marvel collection boundaries!
nodes.name: Doctor Strange

nodes.description: Sideshow and Beast Kingdom present the Death Trooper Egg Attack EAA-161 Action Figure!  The special Imperial Stormtrooper elite units use powerful weapons to protect everything on the Death Star. Their black and mysterious armor symbolizes the horror of the Death Star's capability to destroy everything.  In addition to the high playability of the Egg Attack Action series, the details of the 6' Death Trooper are designed based on the movie Rogue One: A Star Wars Story.  The Death Trooper figure's delicate mechanical structure and the helmet's unique green light effect are the true representations of the original. With detachable tactical vest and exclusive blaster pistol and rifle, the model is a complete representation of the mysterious and unique Imperial special force.  Add to your Star Wars collectibles display today!
nodes.name: Death Trooper

nodes.description: Psychologically speaking, vengeance rarely brings the catharsis we hope for.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Birds of Prey: Harley Quinn Fine Art Print, a cinematic DC Comics art print by artist Tula Lotay.  She's the one they should be scared of! With a new lease on life emancipated from Mistah J, Harley Quinn is ready to hit the town — with a mallet, a baseball bat, or an insightful and cutting behavioral analysis. Inspired by actress Margot Robbie's now-iconic take on the Clown Princess of Crime, this vivid portrait pops with more colors than a confetti gun and is covered in lipstick kisses. Harley poses with her hammer slung over her shoulders as she and her girl gang take on Gotham City's criminal underbelly. Anyone for a post-victory breakfast sandwich?  Originally created as the cover for Birds of Prey: Harley Quinn, written by Amanda Conner and Jimmy Palmiotti for DC Comics, this energetic Birds of Prey artwork is now available for fans in a fine art format. Each Birds of Prey: Harley Quinn Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée or in a custom framed presentation, this Harley Quinn wall art is a total knockout!  Gather up Gotham's most fantabulous girl gang in your collection when you pair Harley Quinn with the Birds of Prey: Black Canary and Birds of Prey: Huntress art prints by Tula Lotay, sold separately.  You know what they say: Behind every successful collection is a badass broad. Bring home the Birds of Prey: Harley Quinn Fine Art Print by Tula Lotay for your wall today.
nodes.name: Birds of Prey: Harley Quinn

nodes.description: 'Mine's Bond - James Bond.'  Sideshow is proud to present the Casino Royale James Bond Book Cover print by artist Michael Gillette. This officially licensed art is printed by Electric Works in San Francisco using archival inks on 100% Cotton Heavyweight rag paper with hand-torn deckle edges.  Each print is signed and numbered in pencil from an edition of 700. The prints are stickered on the back with copyright and licensing information.
nodes.name: Casino Royale

nodes.description: Genetically crafted and outfitted with state-of-the-art equipment, Phase 1 Clone Troopers™ were powerful and loyal soldiers of the Republic Army™. Phase 2 will be rolling out soon, so keep an eye out!  As part of the Faces of the Empire™ Collection, these 1oz pure silver coins are crafted to embody the shape and color of the Phase 1 Clone Trooper's helmet. The detailed design includes extra relief to give the coin additional interest.  Officially licensed, the coin arrives safely stored inside a sleek Star Wars™ branded case, incorporating a large window for easy display. A Certificate of Authenticity can be found on the back of the case, along with the coin's unique number in the limited 10,000 mintage.   Get your blasters ready and join the fight for the Republic™! Order now.
nodes.name: Clone Trooper Phase I 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: This challenge is to the death, remember? So how about we see just how good you really are?   Sideshow presents the Psylocke Premium Format™ Figure, a formidable addition to your X-Men statue collection.  Beautiful and deadly, this psychic mutant is on a moonlit mission of vengeance. The Psylocke Premium Format Figure measures 21 tall and 13.41 wide in a dazzling scene with a unique forced perspective backdrop. Psylocke crouches atop a stone lantern riddled with shuriken that have missed their elusive target. The psionic blade weapon on her right arm emanates the butterfly-shaped effect of her powers. Beyond her, the full moon rises and casts light and shadow across a pair of pagodas that sit further up the mountain path.   The polystone Psylocke Premium Format Figure is fully sculpted and features a dynamic paint application created with the scene's thematic lighting in mind. She wears her iconic '90s blue bodysuit with a large red sash fluttering from her waist. Psylocke also carries a sheathed katana, her left hand resting on the weapon in anticipation of her next strike. This skilled mutant fighter also comes with a swap-out right arm reaching to draw her katana blade, adding to her arsenal of display options. With detail at every angle of the sculpt, this Marvel Comics collectible is sure to be the centerpiece in any collection!  Reach deep inside your mind and bring home the Psylocke Premium Format Figure today — whether you have mutant telekinesis or not!
nodes.name: Psylocke

nodes.description: 'Mr. Spock has orders to kill you, Captain. He will succeed... apparently. You will also appear to have killed him after a fierce battle. Regrettable, but it will leave me in command.'  In the Star Trek: The Original Series Mirror, Mirror episode some members of the Enterprise crew are transported to a parallel dimension where the benevolent Federation never existed and instead the morally corrupt Terran Empire reigns. Star Trek has revisited this universe in various shows, with some of the most popular characters coming from this world.  EXO-6 is releasing the second figure in the Mirror Universe line with Security Chief Sulu, the scarred and very evil double of the Enterprise's Lieutenant Sulu. This Sulu is ambitious, homicidal and a sexual predator that will do anything to become captain.  George Takei had a large scar on his face for this portrayal and had fun with the sly, evil grins. EXO-6 has recreated this look in detail for this 1:6 scale museum-quality action figure. Standing 11 inches tall, every element, from his 23rd-century uniform to his Terran awards are authentically reproduced. The original portrait sculpt of Takei as Mirror Sulu has an authentic, hand-painted likeness.
nodes.name: Mirror Universe Sulu

nodes.description: Sideshow and Storm Collectibles are proud to present the very first 1:6 scale figure from Mortal Kombat, Sub-Zero!  An assassin of the Lin Kuei clan, Kuai Liang commands the power of ice and cold. Unlike other members of his clan, he and his older brother, Bi-Han, were abducted as children by the Lin Kuei and trained in the techniques of assassination throughout their lives.  Though his codename is Tundra, he has now assumed the mantle of Sub-Zero to honor his brother after Bi-Han's mysterious death. With the help of his fellow Lin Kuei Smoke, Sub-Zero tirelessly hunts the one who killed his brother.  Don't miss your chance to add this 1:6 action figure to your Mortal Kombat collection today!
nodes.name: Sub-Zero

nodes.description: Sideshow and Queen Studios are proud to present the Iron Man Mark 3 Life-Size Bust!  Tony Stark's third Iron Man Armor, the Mark III first appeared in Marvel Studios' Iron Man 2008. An upgrade from the Mark II, the MK3 was constructed of a gold-titanium alloy and was the first suit to adopt the classic red and gold color scheme. Stark later added the Mark 3 to his hall of armor and it has since become one of his most iconic suits.  This 1/1 scale Iron Man Mark 3 Bust includes the full chest, back, and shoulders of the armor. From the side view of the bust, the mechanical insides of the suit are visible highlighting the complexity of Stark's designs. The arc reactor in the center of the chest and the eyes have a light-up function and glow. The head is patriotically facing rightwards. The base is modeled from the original Mark 3 hips and connects with the bust from the center and moves outwards to the underarms.  Don't miss your chance to add the Iron Man Mark 3 Life-Size Bust to your armory.
nodes.name: Iron Man Mark 3

nodes.description: Sideshow and Queen Studios are proud to present the Carnage Life-Size Bust. Queen Studios' 1/1 scale Carnage bust brings one of Marvel Comic's most iconic characters to life.   The symbiote known as Carnage has been recreated with bone white eyes, a wide-open mouth and a whipping tongue. Crafted from polystone with resin saliva, no detail has been spared as the Queen Studios team has captured the character with an incredible life-like look, even down to his ferocious teeth.   The bust stands at almost 30 inches (75cm) tall and is modeled from a variant cover of issue no.5 of Marvel Comics' series Absolute Carnage!
nodes.name: Carnage

nodes.description: From the film Son of Godzilla, released in 1967, comes Godzilla now in DefoReal form!  Son of Godzilla, has been faithfully recreated in the signature detailed yet deformed DefoReal style. Please enjoy 1967's Godzilla that fought a fierce battle with Kamacuras and Kumonga!
nodes.name: Godzilla (1967)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Queen Studios are proud to present the Rescue (Pepper Potts) Life-Size Bust!  Expertly designed with intricate detailing, the 1:1 life-size Rescue bust is a movie-accurate depiction of the Rescue armor worn by Pepper Potts in Marvel Studios' Avengers: Endgame. In keeping with the original armor, Queen Studios' artists have captured the sleek design and contours of the suit. The paintwork is masterfully applied to recreate the metallic lavender blue aesthetic, with champagne gold and silver trim.  Like Tony Stark's Iron Man armor, the Mark 49 'Rescue' armor includes the arc reactor as the main power source. For this limited edition collectible Rescue bust, the arc reactor is visible front and center and can be displayed fully lit. Accurate to the movie, the rear panels incorporate both of the armor's key identifiers, Rescue and 0049 . While the base is crafted to look sleek and elegant with the displacer sentries flanking on the left and right.  Don't miss your chance to add the Iron Man Mark 49 Rescue (Pepper Potts) Life-Size Bust to your armory!
nodes.name: Rescue (Pepper Potts)

nodes.description: The Star Ace Vinyl Model series has begun at last!  In celebration of the 100th Anniversary of the master of movie stop motion animation, Ray Harryhausen, Sideshow and Star Ace are proud to present the Kraken, a giant and fearsome sea monster sent by the gods to destroy mortals that have defied them.  Perhaps Ray Harryhausen's greatest achievement in stop-motion animation, the Kraken is a huge four-armed creature with a long tail and terrifying face.  Traditionally sculpted by the artisans of the famed creature shop of Kaibutsuya, this detailed Kraken Model Kit is made from soft vinyl and stands 13.77' tall and 21.25' long.  Don't miss your chance to add this model kit to your Ray HarryHausen collection today!
nodes.name: Kraken
